meaning: (of an organization) to have as a subunit
sentence: 这个部门下设三个科室，各有分工。
pinyin: Zhè ge bù mén xià shè sān gè kē shì, gè yǒu fēn gōng.
english: This department has three sub-offices, each with its own responsibilities.

sentence: 这个城市的平均收入比全国水平高不少。
pinyin: Zhè ge chéng shì de píng jūn shōu rù bǐ quán guó shuǐ píng gāo bù shǎo.
english: The average income in this city is considerably higher than the national level.

sentence: 合同纠纷一般按民法的规定来处理。
pinyin: Hé tong jiū fēn yī bān àn mín fǎ de guī dìng lái chǔ lǐ.
english: Contract disputes are generally handled according to civil law provisions.

meaning: gross domestic production (GDP); total output value
sentence: 去年这个省的生产总值超过了五万亿元。
pinyin: Qù nián zhè ge shěng de shēng chǎn zǒng zhí chāo guò le wǔ wàn yì yuán.
english: Last year this province's gross output value exceeded five trillion yuan.

meaning: water meter; indicator of water level
sentence: 物业每个月来抄一次水表。
pinyin: Wù yè měi gè yuè lái chāo yī cì shuǐ biǎo.
english: Property management reads the water meter once a month.
